name: player_salaries with where
description: Test case for player_salaries with where
expected_query: with "td499c6d9b0d86f7aa539f7f2cd4570c8" as (select "player_salaries"."pid", "player_salaries"."salary", "nfl_games"."year", "nfl_games"."week" from "player_salaries" inner join "nfl_games" on "player_salaries"."esbid" = "nfl_games"."esbid" where "player_salaries"."source_id" in ('DRAFTKINGS') and "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2025_REG_WEEK_1') and player_salaries.salary >= '5000') select "player"."pid", "td499c6d9b0d86f7aa539f7f2cd4570c8"."salary" AS "dfs_salary_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "td499c6d9b0d86f7aa539f7f2cd4570c8" on "td499c6d9b0d86f7aa539f7f2cd4570c8"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "td499c6d9b0d86f7aa539f7f2cd4570c8"."salary", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
